case_title: MICHELE DELIA ET AL VS. CARLA LUCERO ET AL

docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,050.00 FILED BY DELIA, MICHELE SALZEIDER, SAM AS TO DEFENDANT LUCERO, CARLA HSM REALTY FINANCE MGMT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. MICHELE DELIA AND SAM SALZEIDER WERE PRESENT AND WAIVED SERVICE ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. CARLA LUCERO WAS PRESENT. HSM REALTY AND FINANCE MANAGEMENT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JERALD JOSEPH, PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELIA, MICHELE SALZEIDER, SAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCERO, CARLA $2,050.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,130.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST HSM FINANCE MANAGMENT IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANTSHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $921.67 AN AMOUNT WHICH THE DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-01-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: THE CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DAY FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL, TRIAL DE NOVO, WITH THE PARTIES, THE COURT, AND COURTROOM PERSONNEL PRESENT IN THE COURTROOM. APPELLANT MICHELE DELIA AND SAM SALZEIDER APPEAR IN PROPRIA PERSONA; RESPONDENT CARLA LUCERO APPEARS WITH ATTORNEY BENJAMIN J. HOLL OF HOLL LAW & MEDIATION.

THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH, ALL PARTIES ARE ADMINISTERED THE OATH BY THE CLERK. THEREUPON, THE COURT ENTERTAINS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED DURING THE PROCEEDINGS.

AFTER HEARING STATEMENTS PRESENTED AND AFTER REVIEWING BOTH ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUMISSION.

JUDGE PRO TEM: JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK: MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-13-2017 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-13-2017 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Continued To Jan-12-17 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
